summary: 25FT steel blade tape measure for construction, hardware retail, and private-label supply, with inch or dual-unit markings, durable case options, and custom packaging support.

sellingPoints: 25FT measuring range for construction and jobsite applications
Inch, metric, or dual-unit blade layout options by market requirement
OEM logo, shell color, hook, barcode, and retail packaging support

specs.label: Length
specs.value: 25ft primary option, with 16ft, 26ft, 30ft, or buyer-specific lengths by model

specs.label: Blade
specs.value: Steel blade with imperial, metric, or dual-unit printed markings available by project

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Case logo, shell color, blade layout, hook type, belt clip, lanyard, packaging, barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: Blister card, color box, display box, hang card, bulk pack, export carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ discussion for selected 25ft models, logo method, and packaging direction

specs.label: OEM Service
specs.value: Private-label artwork review, sample confirmation, packaging setup, and shipment support

title: 25FT Imperial Steel Blade Tape Measure
quality: 25ft blade length, printing accuracy, unit marking, and readability review
Locking, retraction, hook rivet, lanyard, and belt clip inspection
